omniProcessElements.name: OmniStudioDocuSignApi
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%isOmniStudio% == 'true'", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "HTTPAction1", "namedCredential" : "AUTOSCHEDULER", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "%endpoint%", "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "restMethod" : "POST", "restOptions" : { "clientCertificateName" : "", "headers" : { }, "isCompressed" : false, "params" : { }, "sendBody" : true, "timeout" : 0, "xmlEscapeResponse" : false }, "restPath" : "/services/data/v56.0/connect/e-sign/signature-requests/%SObjectId%/envelope/send", "retryCount" : 0, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "SetVlocityEnvelopeDetails:Envelope", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "show" : null, "type" : "Integration", "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: SendDocuSignEnvelope
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { "envelope" : "%SetVlocityEnvelopeDetails:Envelope%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%isOmniStudio% <> 'true'", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction1", "remoteClass" : "GenericDocuSignIntegrationService", "remoteMethod" : "sendEnvelope", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }

omniProcessElements.name: sendEnvelopeForESign
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "actionMessage" : "", "additionalChainableResponse" : { }, "additionalInput" : { "documentName" : "%docTitle%", "email" : "%generateDocument:recipientEmail%", "name" : "%generateDocument:recipientName%", "namedcred" : "EDocuSign", "parentId" : "%SObjectId%", "sourceId" : "%DetermineDocumentToSend:myDocument%" }, "additionalOutput" : { }, "chainOnStep" : false, "disOnTplt" : false, "executionConditionalFormula" : "%isOmniStudio% == 'true'", "failOnStepError" : true, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "label" : "RemoteAction2", "remoteClass" : "DocumentESigner", "remoteMethod" : "sendSignatureRequest", "remoteOptions" : { }, "responseJSONNode" : "", "responseJSONPath" : "", "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : true, "show" : null, "useFormulas" : true }
